import io
import string
import list

fn parse_line(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut cur = 0
  mut has = false
  mut neg = false
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        if has
          if neg
            result = list.push(result, -cur)
          else
            result = list.push(result, cur)
          end
          cur = 0
          has = false
          neg = false
        end
      else if b == 45
        neg = true
      else if b == 43
        ()
      else
        cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
        has = true
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has
    if neg
      result = list.push(result, -cur)
    else
      result = list.push(result, cur)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn concat(_ a: List<Int>, _ b: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut r = a
  mut i = 0
  while i < b.len()
    match b.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      r = list.push(r, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  r
end

fn sort_dedupe(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut remaining = xs
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  while remaining.len() > 0
    mut min_val = 0
    mut first = true
    mut j = 0
    while j < remaining.len()
      match remaining.get(j)
      when Some(v)
        if first
          min_val = v
          first = false
        else
          if v < min_val
            min_val = v
          end
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    let rlen = result.len()
    if rlen == 0
      result = list.push(result, min_val)
    else
      match result.get(rlen - 1)
      when Some(last)
        if last != min_val
          result = list.push(result, min_val)
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    mut new_rem: List<Int> = []
    mut k = 0
    while k < remaining.len()
      match remaining.get(k)
      when Some(v)
        if v != min_val
          new_rem = list.push(new_rem, v)
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      k = k + 1
    end
    remaining = new_rem
  end
  result
end

fn to_output(_ xs: List<Int>) -> String
  mut out = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < xs.len()
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if i == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  out
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let a = parse_line(line1)
let b = parse_line(line2)
let combined = concat(a, b)
let sorted = sort_dedupe(combined)
println(to_output(sorted))
